𓈈⠀⠀ 𝅄 ⠀᧔◍᧓ ⠀⠀ 𝅄 𓈈

𓈈⠀⠀ 𝅄 ⠀᧔◍᧓ ⠀⠀ 𝅄 𓈈

Everyone has the one popular song that they can claim as their own little underrated banger. Like is Still into you by Paramore a popular song? Yes. Will I still claim it like it only has a couple thousand listens? Also yes. Like you guys might listen to the song but I DIGEST it, I CONSUME it, I LIVE it. I saw Paramore live and I almost started crying when they played this song. Reminds me so much of when I was a teenager, sitting in a Sonic parking lot after theater practice, eating ice cream with my only friend. Nostalgia will be the end of me.
